[Page 1]
ShopEasy E-Commerce
Customer Support
Knowledge Base v2.0
Comprehensive policies, FAQs, and procedures for customer support operations.
1. RETURN & REFUND POLICY
Overview
ShopEasy offers a 30-day hassle-free return policy on all products. Items must be unused, in original
packaging, with all tags attached. Electronics have a 15-day return window. Perishable goods, digital
downloads, and customized items are non-returnable.
Refund Process

ustomized items are non-returnable.
Refund Process Once we receive and inspect your returned item, we will process your refund within 5-7 business days.
Refunds are issued to the original payment method. For credit/debit cards, allow 3-5 additional business
days for the refund to appear. For UPI payments, refunds are instant to 24 hours.
Return Shipping
For defective or incorrect items, ShopEasy provides a free return shipping label. For change-of-mind

s a free return shipping label. For change-of-mind returns, the customer bears the return shipping cost, which is deducted from the refund amount (typically
Rs. 50-150).
Damaged/Defective Items
If you receive a damaged or defective product, contact support within 48 hours of delivery. We will arrange
a free pickup and send a replacement or full refund. Photos of the damage are required for processing.
Exchange Policy

amage are required for processing.
Exchange Policy Exchanges are available for size or color changes within the 30-day return window, subject to stock
availability. Exchange requests can be placed through My Orders section.
2. SHIPPING & DELIVERY
Domestic Shipping

[Page 2]
Standard shipping (5-7 business days): FREE on orders above Rs. 499. For orders below Rs. 499,
shipping charges of Rs. 49 apply. Express shipping (2-3 business days): Rs. 99 flat rate. Same-day
delivery is available in select metro cities (Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi, Chennai, Hyderabad) for orders
placed before 11 AM.
International Shipping
ShopEasy ships to 25+ countries. International shipping rates vary by destination. Estimated delivery is

g rates vary by destination. Estimated delivery is 10-20 business days. Customs duties and taxes are borne by the customer and are not included in the
product price.
Order Processing
Orders are processed within 24-48 hours on business days (Monday-Saturday, excluding public holidays).
You will receive a shipping confirmation email with tracking details once your order is dispatched.
Tracking Your Order

once your order is dispatched.
Tracking Your Order Track your order via the "My Orders" section in your account or use the tracking number sent to your
email. Tracking updates every 4-6 hours. For real-time updates, download the ShopEasy mobile app.
Failed Delivery
If delivery fails after 3 attempts, the package is held at the nearest courier facility for 5 days. If unclaimed, it
is returned to us and a refund is initiated minus shipping charges. Contact support to rearrange delivery

ing charges. Contact support to rearrange delivery before return.
3. PAYMENT & BILLING
Accepted Payment Methods
Credit Cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Rupay), Debit Cards, Net Banking (all major banks), UPI (Google
Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM), EMI (3, 6, 9, 12 months - No Cost EMI on select products), Cash on
Delivery (available for orders up to Rs. 5,000 in select pincodes), ShopEasy Wallet.
EMI Options

in select pincodes), ShopEasy Wallet.
EMI Options No Cost EMI is available on orders above Rs. 3,000 with select bank credit cards. Standard EMI is
available from Rs. 1,000 onwards. EMI charges vary by bank and tenure. EMI is not available on Cash on
Delivery orders.
Payment Security
All transactions are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption. We are PCI-DSS compliant. We never store your
full card details. All payments are processed through RBI-approved payment gateways.

[Page 3]
Invoice & GST
GST invoices are auto-generated for all orders. Download invoices from My Orders > Invoice. For
business purchases requiring GST input credit, enter your GSTIN during checkout. GST rates vary by
product category (0%, 5%, 12%, 18%, 28%).
Failed Payments
If your payment fails, the amount is not deducted. In rare cases of technical issues, any deducted amount
is automatically reversed within 5-7 business days. Contact support with your bank reference number if
needed.

support with your bank reference number if
needed. 4. ORDER MANAGEMENT
Order Cancellation
Orders can be cancelled within 2 hours of placement if not yet dispatched, via My Orders section. Once
dispatched, cancellation is not possible — initiate a return after delivery. For prepaid orders, refunds are
processed within 5-7 business days.
Order Modification
Product changes cannot be made after order placement. You may update the delivery address if the order

. You may update the delivery address if the order has not been dispatched — contact support immediately. Quantity changes require cancellation and
re-ordering.
Order Status
Order Confirmed: Payment received. Processing: Item being prepared. Dispatched: Handed to courier.
Out for Delivery: With delivery agent. Delivered: Successfully delivered. Return Initiated: Return in
progress.
Bulk Orders

Return Initiated: Return in
progress.
Bulk Orders For bulk orders (10+ units), contact our B2B team at business@shopeasy.in for special pricing, invoicing,
and priority shipping. Bulk orders have a 45-day return window with dedicated account manager support.
5. ACCOUNT & MEMBERSHIP
Account Registration
Create a free account with email/phone. Verify via OTP. Social login available with Google and Facebook.

. Social login available with Google and Facebook. One account per email/phone number. For multiple users in a household, separate accounts are
recommended.

[Page 4]
ShopEasy Plus Membership
ShopEasy Plus (Rs. 299/year or Rs. 99/quarter): Free express shipping on all orders, Priority customer
support (response within 2 hours), Exclusive member-only deals (up to 30% extra discount), Early access
to sales and new product launches, Free returns with doorstep pickup.
Loyalty Points
Earn 1 point per Rs. 10 spent. 100 points = Rs. 10 discount. Points expire after 12 months of inactivity.

ount. Points expire after 12 months of inactivity. Points cannot be used for purchasing gift cards or during cashback offers.
Account Security
Enable two-factor authentication for enhanced security. Never share your OTP with anyone. ShopEasy will
never ask for your password. Report unauthorized account activity immediately to security@shopeasy.in.
Password & Login Issues
Use "Forgot Password" to reset via email or SMS OTP. If your account is locked after 5 failed attempts,

If your account is locked after 5 failed attempts, wait 30 minutes or use "Forgot Password". For hacked accounts, contact support@shopeasy.in
immediately with account details.
6. PRODUCT & CATALOG
Product Authenticity
All products on ShopEasy are 100% authentic. We source directly from brands and authorized distributors.
Products come with manufacturer warranty. Counterfeit products are never listed — report suspicious
listings to trust@shopeasy.in.
Product Warranty

us
listings to trust@shopeasy.in.
Product Warranty Electronics: 1-year manufacturer warranty (some products offer extended warranty at purchase).
Appliances: 1-2 year warranty. Clothing & accessories: No warranty but covered under return policy.
Warranty service is provided by the manufacturer, not ShopEasy.
Product Reviews
Reviews are only accepted from verified purchasers. Reviews are moderated for content policy

rchasers. Reviews are moderated for content policy compliance. Each product review earns 10 loyalty points. Report fake or misleading reviews via the flag
option.
Out of Stock Items
Use "Notify Me" on out-of-stock products to get email/SMS alerts when restocked. Pre-orders are available
for select upcoming products with an estimated delivery date.

[Page 5]
7. CUSTOMER SUPPORT
Contact Channels
Live Chat: Available 24x7 on website and app (fastest response). Phone Support: 1800-XXX-XXXX
(Toll-free, 8AM-10PM IST, Mon-Sat). Email Support: support@shopeasy.in (Response within 24 hours).
WhatsApp: +91-98765-XXXXX (9AM-9PM IST). Social Media: @ShopEasy on Twitter/Instagram.
Response Times
Live Chat: Instant to 5 minutes. Phone: Average wait time 3-5 minutes. Email: Within 24 business hours.

time 3-5 minutes. Email: Within 24 business hours. WhatsApp: Within 2-4 hours. ShopEasy Plus Members get priority queue across all channels.
Escalation Process
Tier 1: Automated bot and FAQ resolution. Tier 2: Support representative. Tier 3: Senior support specialist.
Tier 4: Management escalation (for legal or compliance matters). Most issues resolve at Tier 1 or 2.
Grievance Officer
For unresolved complaints, contact our Grievance Officer: grievance@shopeasy.in within 30 days of the

ficer: grievance@shopeasy.in within 30 days of the incident. Grievance is acknowledged within 48 hours and resolved within 30 days as per Consumer
Protection (E-Commerce) Rules 2020.
